***![][image1]***  
***The “Lease Option w/ strike price following the declining principal balance  of optionors mortgage” Template***

**Lease Agreement**

* Lease term is negotiable but no longer than the window closure of the option.   
* Monthly lease payment shall be equal to the underlying committed principal and interest payment inclusive of taxes and insurance. *(this number will adjust over time as taxes and insurance change.)*

**Option Consideration**

* The lease itself serves as “good and valuable consideration” for the option. 

**Option Window**

* The option window to purchase subject property opens day one of the lease agreement \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_ and extends through a negotiated term \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_. 

**Option Strike Price**

* Strike price shall be the outstanding principal balance on the mortgage at the time the optionee exercises the option.  

[image1]: <data:image/png;base64,>
